---
title: "Salmonid Mortality Analysis: TidyTuesday"
subtitle: "Reproducible analysis using quarto"
author: "Arush Mohan"
date: today
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: true               # Table of contents
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true         # Allows folding of long code blocks
    embed-resources: true   # Makes a standalone HTML (easy to share)
editor: visual
---

``` {r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Loading in the packages

library(tidyverse)    # includes dplyr, tidyr, readr, ggplot2
library(lubridate)    # date handling
library(janitor)      # clean column names
library(scales)       # number formatting (percent, comma)

# Setting a theme

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

# Loading in the csv files from Github

monthly_losses_data <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-03-17/monthly_losses_data.csv')
monthly_mortality_data <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-03-17/monthly_mortality_data.csv')

```


```{r}
#|label: Cleaning the data
#|include: false

# The data provided is already in a clean format

# Quick check of the data structure

glimpse(monthly_losses_data)
glimpse(monthly_mortality_data)


```

## Overview

Add an overview of the project



## How does monthly mortality differ over time? 

A summary of mortality statistics

```{r}
#| label: mortality-over-time-data
#| echo: false


# Convert date to Date class and summarise metrics over time
mort_time <- monthly_mortality_data |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) |>
  group_by(species, date) |>
  summarise(
    median_mortality = median(median, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1 = median(q1, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = median(q3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
glimpse(mort_time)
```

```{r}
#| label: mortality-over-time-plot

# Line plot showing mortality over time by species.
ggplot(mort_time, aes(x = date, y = median_mortality, colour = species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Monthly Mortality Over Time",
    subtitle = "Aggregated across all regions",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Median mortality"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

```


## Which region has the lowest mortality? 

Average mortality for each region 

```{r}
#| label: regional mortality data

# The dataset does not contain raw individual‑fish mortality measurements, only regional monthly medians

# Average median mortality by region
mort_by_region <- monthly_mortality_data |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) |> 
  group_by(geo_group, region, species) |> 
  summarise(
    avg_median_mortality = mean(median, na.rm = TRUE),
    p10 = quantile(median, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE),
    p90 = quantile(median, .90, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_months = sum(!is.na(median)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


```
